description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/libvdwxc/libvdwxc with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a build_userguide job that runs `sphinx-build -W doc/userguide/ public` and stores the public directory as an artifact. Also in the build stage add a compile_library job that runs `autoreconf -i`, `mkdir build`, `cd build`, `../configure`, `make`, `make check`, and `make install`, then publishes the build directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs `ls -l public/` and `chmod go-rwX -R public/`, uploads the public directory as the Pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch. Ensure the pipeline publishes the site via GitLab Pages.
